zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡下行
zh.content:
当前XRP/美元整体维持偏弱震荡结构，价格贴近日内低位运行，多头动能不足，短期趋势略向下，整体仍处于整理回落节奏之中。

MACD维持负值且动能柱偏弱，显示空头仍占主导；价格持续低于20日均线，均线压制明显，短线反弹缺乏持续性动力支撑。

下方支撑关注1.042与1.040区域，一旦失守可能触发进一步下探；上方阻力位于1.054及1.060附近，需放量突破才可能转强。

操作上建议以反弹做空为主，未有效站上SMA20前不宜追多；若跌破支撑区间，可顺势跟进空单，注意控制仓位与止损。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at **1.04341**, sitting slightly below its recent range and under the **20-period simple moving average of 1.054538**, indicating that short-term momentum remains tilted to the downside. The modest **24-hour decline of 0.15%** suggests selling pressure is relatively controlled rather than aggressive, but buyers have not yet demonstrated enough strength to reclaim nearby resistance. As long as price remains beneath the moving average, rallies may continue to face selling interest.

Technical indicators present a cautiously bearish picture. Although the **RSI(14)** is unavailable, the **MACD value of -0.0023809985** points to weakening momentum, reflecting that bearish pressure still has a slight edge. Without the MACD signal line, confirmation is limited, so traders should avoid relying on this indicator alone. Price action around the current level will therefore be more important than momentum readings until additional confirmation becomes available.

The immediate support zone is located around **1.042**, which aligns closely with the session low and has so far prevented a deeper decline. A decisive break below this level could expose additional downside as short-term sellers gain confidence. On the upside, initial resistance appears near **1.045**, followed by the more significant barrier around the **20-period SMA at 1.0545**. A sustained move above that moving average would improve the short-term technical outlook and could encourage renewed buying interest.

From a trading perspective, patience may be preferable while XRP remains trapped between nearby support and resistance. Conservative traders could wait for either a confirmed breakout above **1.0545** or a breakdown below **1.042** before committing to directional positions. Range traders may look for carefully managed opportunities near support and resistance with disciplined risk controls. Given the relatively narrow daily range and mixed signals, maintaining tight stop-loss levels and avoiding oversized positions would be a prudent approach until stronger momentum develops.
